meta.title: LocalAI Text Generation
meta.description: Generate text with LocalAI via OpenAI-compatible API

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Trigger LocalAI text generation via webhook. Expected JSON: { messages, model?, temperature?, max_tokens?, stream? }. API key via X-API-Key header only (no body fallback). Set LOCALAI_API_KEY env var to enable auth.

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.notes: SECURITY: Input validation with timing-safe API key auth (header only, no body fallback, constant-time length check prevents length oracle attacks). Validates messages array structure, model name format, and numeric parameters.

nodes.name: Check Valid
nodes.notes: Branch based on validation result. True branch continues to LocalAI Request, false branch goes to Error Response.

nodes.name: Error Response
nodes.notes: Return HTTP 400 for validation errors. Configured as response node for webhook responseMode.

nodes.name: LocalAI Request
nodes.notes: Forward validated inputs to LocalAI API. 5 min timeout, 100MB max response.

nodes.name: Success Response
nodes.notes: Return LocalAI response. Configured as response node for webhook responseMode.
